name: Inventory Change Log Report
body: [{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Overview"}],"data-id":"overview"},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The 'Inventory Change Log' is an historical record of stock changes made to each sku and is found in the reporting section of neto. The record limit criteria for the Inventory Change Log has been changed to enforce a limit of record count instead of time period. Now, instead of retaining the records for up to 90 days, Neto will retain up to 15 Million Inventory Change Log records irrespective of the number of days. This change will help you access historical data for longer period. We recommend you "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1519-inventory-change-log-report#export-log","children":[{"text":"export the data"}]},{"text":" periodically to keep a record of stock changes incase the log exceeds 15 million entries."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To view the inventory change log:"}]},{"type":"ol","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"In your Neto control panel, click on "},{"text":"Reports","bold":true},{"text":"."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Search for and click on "},{"text":"Inventory Change Log","bold":true},{"text":"."}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"You'll see a table of information, search filters to display specific information, and columns that can be added/removed from the table. They are explained below:"}]},{"type":"table","children":[{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"th","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Column Name"}]}]},{"type":"th","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Description"}]}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"ID"}]}]},{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Unique identifier of the change in the database."}]}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Date"}]}]},{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The date the change occurred."}]}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Product SKU / name"}]}]},{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The product where the stock change occurred."}]}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Warehouse"}]}]},{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The warehouse where the product’s stock change occurred."}]}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Qty on hand change"}]}]},{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The amount the quantity on hand changed (qty on hand = physical qty, plus kitted qty, less committed qty.)"}]}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Qty on hand"}]}]},{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Total quantity on hand after the change occurred."}]}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Warehouse qty change"}]}]},{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The amount the warehouse quantity changed."}]}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Warehouse qty"}]}]},{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The total warehouse quantity after the change occurred."}]}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Committed qty change"}]}]},{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The amount the committed stock changed. A negative value indicates the stock was uncommitted."}]}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Committed qty"}]}]},{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The total amount of stock committed after the change occurred."}]}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Warehouse committed qty change"}]}]},{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The amount the warehouse committed quantity changed. A negative value indicates the stock was uncommitted."}]}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Warehouse committed qty"}]}]},{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The total amount of warehouse stock committed after the change occurred."}]}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Build qty change"}]}]},{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The amount the build quantity changed. Build quantity refers to the total amount of stock in a variation or kit parent product. A negative value indicates the stock was uncommitted."}]}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Build qty"}]}]},{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The total build quantity after the change occurred. Build quantity refers to the total amount of stock in a variation or kit parent product."}]}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Component qty change"}]}]},{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The amount that the component quantity changed. Component quantity refers to the amount of stock in a warehouse for part of a kit product."}]}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Component qty"}]}]},{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The total component quantity after the change occurred. Component quantity refers to the amount of stock in a warehouse for part of a kit product."}]}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Reference"}]}]},{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"A link to the order, RMA, stock adjustment or other operation that initiated the stock change."}]}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Information"}]}]},{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The information column displays what caused the stock to change (message), how the change was made (API calls, batch process, control panel) and who triggered the change (application name, username, Global API key).\n            More information can be found in the tables below."}]}]}]}],"id":"rich-table-11db1bc0","colSizes":[300,300]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Log Message"}],"data-id":"1"},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The log message describes what caused the stock to change on a product.
